name: Fish Marinated in Herbed Olive Oil
recipeIngredient: Fresh rosmary, handful, removed from stems
Fresh oregano, handful, removed from stems
Fresh fish filets or steaks (thick halibut or salmon best)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the garlic, rosemary, oregano, parsley, and black pepper in a food processor and chop coarsely.
2. Rub both sides of the desired fish and place in a glass baking dish. Do not add any salt or acids such as lemon juice or vinegar at this time!
3. Add the olive oil and turn the fish a couple of times. The fish should be nearly or completely submerged in the oil.
4. For best results, refrigerate the fish overnight with the marinade. You may also marinate it for a few hours.
5. To cook, pat off the excess oil and lightly salt to taste. Grill, broil, or bake the fish to your liking. Do not overcook!
6. Serve with lemon wedges. The leftover herbed oil can be refrigerated for a few days and reused only for fresh seafood preparation.
